user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — Pass 6 (Frontend Performance & Accessibility, EXPERT_PANEL.md §8). Read-only forensic pass over the public landing surface (components/foldera/LandingPage.tsx + app/globals.css), verified live at 375px. Verdict PASS. Posture confirmed: reduced-motion covers BOTH framer (MotionConfig reducedMotion='user') and the raw CSS keyframe animations (globals.css:3431 disables .ld-float/.ld-marquee/.ld-signal); overflow-x:hidden + max-w wrapper give zero horizontal overflow at 375 (main measured 375.33px); focus rings global + .ld-scoped; next/image with explicit dims (no CLS); semantic headings; hero LCP text animates immediately (not scroll-gated). Fixed in-pass: three sub-44px tap targets (header CTA min-h-[38px]->44px; mobile menu toggle + overlay close h-10->h-11). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 6 frontend perf/a11y record (docs/frontend/PERF_A11Y_AUDIT.md) + three Tailwind tap-target bumps in components/foldera/LandingPage.tsx + control-plane. No schema, no deps, no CSS logic change.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/design-system-buttons.test.ts
required_browser_proof: Verified live at 375x812: main overflow-x:hidden width 375.33px (no overflow); nav-mobile-menu-toggle computed 44x44; landing-header-cta correctly hidden at 375 (shows >=640); no console errors; hero copy rendered (not animation-gated).
browser_proof_command: preview_start 'Next.js Dev' -> resize mobile -> inspect main.ld + nav-mobile-menu-toggle
acceptance_condition: Landing page passes the FE Perf/A11y kill-questions: no overflow at 375, tap targets >=44px, focus rings visible, reduced-motion honored for framer AND raw CSS animations, content not gated on animation. Three sub-44px tap targets fixed (verified 44px live). Record in docs/frontend/PERF_A11Y_AUDIT.md.
anti_regression_checks: design-system-buttons config test green (no min-h-[48px]/rounded-button regressions)
tap-target changes are pure height/width utility bumps on already-styled controls — no layout reflow
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 6 is up as a PR with the record + live proof and merged; continue to the next audit pass (7 FE design/UX).
next_command: Continue Master Audit #445: Pass 7 (Frontend Design/UX), then Pass 8 (Trust/Claims), 9 (Vercel deploy), 10 (GitHub CI), 11 (observability), 12 (governance meta).
